session.user:
Run the following checks and report results. Do NOT fix any errors, just report them:
1. `ruff check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/scratch/session_markers.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/marker.py` 2. `ty check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/scratch/session_markers.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/plan_save.py`
Report pass/fail status.
session.assistant: I'll run both checks for you. Let me execute them in parallel.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on three Python files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type check on two Python files
